title: Remote Graphic Designer Jobs at Canadian Startups
description: Find remote graphic designer positions at Canadian startups. Include funding stage, company size, and typical equity/salary packages for July 2025.

mainEntity.name: What is the typical salary for a remote graphic designer at a Canadian startup?

acceptedAnswer.text: Salaries typically range from $65,000 CAD for junior/mid-level roles to over $110,000 CAD for senior positions. This often doesn't include equity (stock options) which is standard at Series B+ startups.

mainEntity.name: Do Canadian startups hire remote workers outside of their province?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, many Canadian tech companies like Shopify, Wealthsimple, and 1Password have embraced a 'Remote First' or 'Work from Anywhere in Canada' model, allowing them to hire the best talent regardless of location.

mainEntity.name: What skills are most in-demand for startup designers right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Beyond strong visual fundamentals, startups are looking for designers who understand Figma, AI generative tools (Midjourney, Firefly), basic motion design, and who can work fast in a growth-focused marketing environment.

mainEntity.name: Is equity common for design roles in Canadian startups?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, it is very common. Early-stage startups (Seed/Series A) often offer larger equity grants with lower base salaries, while later-stage companies (Series C+) offer competitive salaries along with standard equity packages (RSUs or options).
